layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6)

component_guidelines.buttons: Square or minimally rounded (2px). Solid colors for primary, 1px border for secondary. Always define hover states.
component_guidelines.tables: Dense, highly scannable. 1px bottom border on rows. No alternating background colors. Left-aligned text, right-aligned numbers. Use Shadcn Table component.
component_guidelines.charts: Recharts. No grid lines except subtle Y-axis. Custom tooltips with high contrast (black bg, white text).
component_guidelines.sidebar: Fixed width (280px). 1px right border. Light gray background (bg-slate-50). Contains accordion/collapsible sections for the extensive filter list.
component_guidelines.top_navigation: Deep blue background (bg-[#0A2540]). Sticky at top. Contains toggle pills (Beyond/Within TAT, etc.) and 'Upload Excel' primary action button.
component_guidelines.kpi_cards: Use 'The Grid Borders' surface strategy. Subdued borders, massive numbers (text-4xl), and tight labels.

avatar_url.description: Professional headshot for the user profile dropdown in the top right header.

logo_strategy.instruction: Use a typographic logo in Chivo font, weight Black, tracking-tighter, combined with a geometric SVG icon (e.g., Lucide Hexagon or Box) inside the deep blue header. No external image needed.

components: Cases by Case Owner Bar Chart

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Strict contrast shifts. bg-slate-100 to bg-slate-200.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast and crisp. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use skeletal loaders for charts and tables rather than spinners.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. E.g., data-testid='upload-excel-btn', data-testid='filter-status-select'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Next-level Enterprise Dashboard. Do NOT use standard Shadcn borders everywhere; combine cards into a 'Grid Borders' layout where appropriate.
Implement the Layout with a fixed Sidebar for filters and a scrollable Main Content area.
Ensure the Header is a deep corporate blue (#0A2540) with white text, adhering to the user's specific request while keeping it premium.
Use Recharts for the Pie Chart and Horizontal Bar Charts. Ensure tooltips are custom and match the Swiss high-contrast theme.
The 'Upload Excel' button must be prominently placed in the Header.
All toggle filters (Beyond/Within TAT, Exclusion/Inclusion) should be stylized as a segmented control (ToggleGroup) in the Header or right below it.
Generate mock data that realistically reflects case management (e.g., Complaints vs Queries, Walk-in vs Email) to populate the dashboard.
Install necessary font packages or add them via Google Fonts in index.html (Chivo and IBM Plex Sans).
Use raw HTML/Tailwind and React.js (.js/.jsx files) for the component structure.
